tasks.subject: Task 0: image_size.py — stdlib dimension reader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read (width, height) from PNG/JPEG/WebP/GIF/BMP headers with no third-party deps.

**Files:** Create flasks/cozy/image_size.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_image_size.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** returns (w,h) for PNG/JPEG/GIF/BMP/WebP; returns None on unrecognized/unreadable.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_image_size.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/image_size.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_image_size.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_image_size.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns (w,h) for PNG/JPEG/GIF/BMP/WebP", "returns None on unrecognized/unreadable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: eta.py — pure ETA estimator + history log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append per-job durations to history.jsonl and predict/blend an ETA from workflow + pixel area.

**Files:** Create flasks/cozy/eta.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_eta.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** predict covers none/workflow-only/exact/single-proportional/multi-linear; blend covers history-only/progress-only/weighted + clamp + None; record_completion appends and trims.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_eta.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/eta.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_eta.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_eta.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["predict covers all 5 branches", "blend covers 3 branches + clamp + None", "record_completion appends and trims"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: runner.py — extracted job-run core + RunLock
tasks.description:
**Goal:** execute() runs one ComfyUI job returning image bytes; RunLock serializes single-job path and queue.

**Files:** Create flasks/cozy/runner.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_runner.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** execute reports progress + returns bytes; raises RunnerError on error/no-output; RunLock mutual exclusion + idempotent release.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_runner.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/runner.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_runner.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_runner.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["execute success returns bytes + progress", "execute raises on error and no-output", "RunLock mutual exclusion + idempotent release"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Refactor job_store.py onto runner + RunLock + ETA
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single-job path uses runner.execute, holds shared RunLock, accepts eta_pixels, records durations to history.jsonl.

**Files:** Modify flasks/cozy/job_store.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_job_store.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** existing tests still pass; success records history pixels; start rejected when lock held.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_job_store.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/job_store.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_job_store.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_job_store.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["existing job_store tests still pass", "success records history pixels", "start rejected when lock held"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: queue_store.py — QueueStore persistence + mutators
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist queue.json + per-job images with atomic writes and all mutators the Scheduler and API need.

**Files:** Create flasks/cozy/queue_store.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_queue_store.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** add/remove/persist across instances; pop_next+finish_current cycle; snapshot predicts eta.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_queue_store.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/queue_store.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_queue_store.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_queue_store.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["add/remove/persist across instances", "pop_next + finish_current cycle", "snapshot predicts eta"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Scheduler — autonomous queue drain with rest gap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scheduler drains the queue via runner.execute, continues on failure, 30s gap between jobs, stoppable, resumes after restart.

**Files:** Modify flasks/cozy/queue_store.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_scheduler.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** runs in order + records history; continue-on-failure; gap between but not after last; resume finalizes leftover current.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_scheduler.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/queue_store.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_scheduler.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_scheduler.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["runs in order + records history", "continue-on-failure", "gap between but not after last", "resume finalizes leftover current"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: /api/status ETA + eta_pixels in /api/generate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /api/status returns live eta; generate computes eta_pixels from the input image for edit workflows.

**Files:** Modify flasks/cozy/cozy.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_app.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** /api/status includes eta; edit generate computes+passes eta_pixels.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/cozy.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/api/status includes eta", "edit generate computes+passes eta_pixels"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: /api/queue/* routes + create_app/run wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose queue over HTTP; construct QueueStore/Scheduler in create_app/run with --rest-gap and restart-resume; block generate while queue active.

**Files:** Modify flasks/cozy/cozy.py; Test flasks/cozy/tests/test_app.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** add/remove/start/stop/clear/status/image behave; queue/start 409 when busy; generate 409 while queue active.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/cozy.py", "flasks/cozy/tests/test_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["queue add/remove/start/stop/clear/status/image behave", "queue/start 409 when busy", "generate 409 while queue active"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: index.html — Single/Queue tabs + Single ETA line
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Single/Queue tab toggle wrapping current UI; show remaining-time line under Single progress bar from /api/status eta.

**Files:** Modify flasks/cozy/templates/index.html

**Acceptance Criteria:** tab bar toggles single/queue views (hidden without has_queue); Single ETA line updates each poll, blank when null.

**Verify:** cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v (template renders)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/templates/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tab bar toggles single/queue views, hidden without has_queue", "Single ETA line updates each poll, blank when null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: index.html — Queue tab UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fill queue-view with pending list, add-current-settings, per-job + total ETA, running bar + gap countdown, Start/Stop, results gallery — driven by /api/queue/status.

**Files:** Modify flasks/cozy/templates/index.html

**Acceptance Criteria:** Add-current-settings appends to Pending; polling renders pending/running/gap/total/results; start/stop/remove/clear work; 409 shows busy notice.

**Verify:** manual run per plan + cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flasks/cozy/templates/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd flasks/cozy && python -m pytest tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Add-current-settings appends to Pending", "polling renders pending/running/gap/total/results", "start/stop/remove/clear work; 409 shows busy notice"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: anixpkgs — changelog + deployment verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm deployment needs no module change; record the feature in anixpkgs changes log.

**Files:** Create anixpkgs/changes/pr-cozy-eta-multijob.md; verify module.nix + default.nix (no edit expected)

**Acceptance Criteria:** cozy builds with new modules + check phase passes; runtime paths writable (no module edit); changelog entry exists.

**Verify:** cd anixpkgs && nix build .#cozy 2>&1 | tail -5 (fallback: pytest as check-phase proxy)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["anixpkgs/changes/pr-cozy-eta-multijob.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd anixpkgs && nix build .#cozy 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cozy builds with new modules + check phase passes", "runtime paths writable (no module edit needed)", "changelog entry exists"]}
```
